name: Self-Hosted Long Run
description: A real self-hosted Campfire task runs long enough to require queue replenishment, validation, and at least one deliberate stop or reassess point.
objective: Measure whether Campfire can improve or harden itself over a long run without losing task coherence.
success_criteria: The run spans multiple milestones with at least one queue replenish.
At least one explicit validation boundary is recorded and respected.
The final stop or reassess point is correct and visible in task state.
candidate_objective: Run a real self-hosted Campfire hardening or extension-boundary backlog until a correct decision boundary or validated milestone boundary is reached.
